changes.text: Personalize your layout with System, Light, and Pitch Black Dark modes.
Design custom navigation bar gradients mixing up to four custom colors.
Dozens of native Pride flag themes (Progress, MLM, WLW, Trans, Nonbinary, and more).

blocks.title: Express Your Identity.
blocks.subtitle: Customization is here. Make your MedTracker workspace feel completely personal with beautiful light and dark modes, color gradients, and vibrant identity palettes.

blocks.text: MedTracker now natively supports a gorgeous Pitch Black dark mode, a clean Light mode, or matching your system settings automatically. Every pixel has been re-tuned for deep contrast, keeping readability high and your eyes rested at midnight.
You aren't locked to one accent anymore. Open the new gradient editor to blend up to four different colors together, painting your top navigation bar with your own custom masterpiece.

Your identity is yours to celebrate. We've built true-to-color theme presets honoring our communities. Select your colors directly in Settings to instantly adapt MedTracker's accent lines and backgrounds to your flag.

rows: Light, Dark, Pitch Black, and Auto System-Matching
Up to 4 custom colors to build unique CSS gradients
Progress Pride, MLM, WLW (Lesbian), Bisexual, Transgender, Non-binary, Demiboy/Demigirl, Aromantic & Asexual spectrum, Pansexual, Genderqueer, and more

blocks.text: To start designing your custom view, simply navigate to Settings -> Appearance inside your app.
